basic_details.job_title: Oil India – Economist, Deputy Chief Engineer and More – 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Oil India Limited (OIL) – Maharatna Central Public Sector Undertaking
basic_details.short_information: The Oil India Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for a total of 10 Economist, Deputy Chief Engineer and More vacancies. The online application process will begin on 28 May 2026, and the last date to submit the application form is 28 June 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Pre-Employment Medical Examination (PEME) - final appointment only after declaration of medical fitness by OIL Medical Board

qualification.education_qualification: 2 years additional upper age (already incorporated in the table; e.g. 37/39 or 39 as indicated)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,00,000–2,60,000 (Starting Basic Pay: Rs. 1,00,000); Approx. Gross ~Rs. 2,00,000/month

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the OIL website. No other mode of application will be accepted. Printouts of online applications should NOT be sent to OIL by post or hand.
seo_tags: Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Economist, Deputy Chief Engineer and More Posts
